description: A digital illustration of a cartoon mascot with the head of a bald eagle and a human body wearing a blue uniform shirt, raising one hand in a wave. The setting is a stylized airport terminal with a U.S. flag hanging from the ceiling and a parked airliner visible through the windows. A U.S. Customs and Border Protection, Department of Homeland Security seal appears on the right.
notable_text: U.S. CUSTOMS AND BORDER PROTECTION; DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY
